design_principles: Preserve existing faction emblems as locked references; do not redesign badges.
Show story-critical props as physical, worn, close-up readable objects with no visible labels or readable text.
Keep costumes complete, functional, role-specific, and age-appropriate; distressing is limited to smoke, frost, wear, stitching, and small repairs.
Use low-magic marks only as small physical traces: moon-white glint, gold-red broken line, cold-white incense thread, insect-wax seal, dry blood line.
Avoid modern logos, UI sheets, product-display lighting, high-magic spell circles, and generic fantasy armor.

prop_designs.shape: Palm-sized broken half-token, roughly semicircular with one jagged fracture side and one smoother worn rim; shallow route grooves on the reverse.
materials: aged gold alloy dulled by hand wear
charred edge soot from Canyang Ao fire
prop_designs.color_logic: Worn gold and moon-white dominate; tiny gold-red route glints appear only in grooves, never as a full glowing seal.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: Must look usable by a 17-year-old hunter's hand; can hang from cord or be wrapped in cloth, not ceremonial oversized.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Only half a relay order; opens or wakes old relay fragments but never functions as a universal key.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: Use the existing Zhaoming emblem only as a root reference for partial sun-moon pressure marks. Do not show a complete clean emblem.

materials: aged gold dust on broken seal edge
prop_designs.color_logic: Mist purple, cold grey, moon-white, dry blood red, and restrained worn gold; royal color is hidden rather than frontal.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: All items must fit close to the body in hidden pockets or a small box; the board should feel like a secret reveal.
prop_designs.continuity_state: The board must not fully explain Yan Nanzhi's bloodline or the whole oath; each document remains fragmentary and partly covered.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: Partial Zhaoming sun-moon marks may appear as torn edges and stains; no complete royal crest on the visible travel layer.

prop_designs.shape: Tall narrow register book with bone-white cover, insect-wax sealed spine, hard corners, and layered pages.
materials: black sun stamp as locked Qingming symbol reference
prop_designs.color_logic: Almost monochrome insect-wax white and bone white, with black sun contrast and extremely small dry blood red page-edge trace.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: Designed for official desk close-ups, held by Qingming clerks or Bai Yi; not a magical grimoire.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Used for village inspection and Shen Zhaomian's entry, but the image itself must contain no readable names.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: Reference the existing Suming/Qingming emblem only as a small black sun or wax-stamp fragment; do not redesign it.

included_items: Qingming incense stick or ash holder
thin cold-white smoke thread touching cloth edge
prop_designs.color_logic: Cold white, pearl grey, bone white, black sun fragments, and tiny dry blood red needle-point risk.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: All tools should be small enough for Bai Yi to cleanly handle before interrogation or screening.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Qingming incense tracks slowly and can be dampened by old relay humidity; it is not an attack spell.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: Use Qingming iconography as institutional marks on wax and tray only.

prop_designs.shape: Folded, partly torn old relay map with missing corners, oil-paper backing, old stone weights, and route rings.
prop_designs.color_logic: Old white, damp brown, worn copper gold, hidden gold-red broken route lines, and a few cold wax-white cover marks.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: Should feel practical for travel decisions, not a complete world atlas.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Shows the first-season route logic without readable place names; map remains incomplete.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: Sun-moon route logic may be partial and scratched; no clean emblem or readable labels.

prop_designs.color_logic: Bone white split between border-wall grey and northern ochre/frozen blue accents.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: The Grey Wall whistle is short, tactical, tied to armor; the Northern flute is longer, weathered, and linked to Minggu Ridge sound.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Must clearly distinguish Xue Linqiang's measuring whistle from northern bone-flute geography cues.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: Grey Wall has no official badge; use object marks, not a new crest.

prop_designs.color_logic: Wallfoot grey-blue, terracotta, old cloth yellow, black wood, and tiny dark-green scale hints.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: Small tradeable objects that can hang from Lu Qingli's waist or disappear into a pocket.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Represents unofficial survival marks, not a new Wallfoot faction emblem.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: No official crest; use shaved corners, broken lines, two-hole pottery and knotted cords.

materials: insect-wax ring reflection as future-state hint
prop_designs.color_logic: Light grey, herb green, burnt brown, and a small Qingming white future shadow.
prop_designs.scale_and_handling: Child-sized and practical; the pouch must feel used by a village child who knows herb names.
prop_designs.continuity_state: Can survive into the Qingming Court child-white state as a family-memory anchor.
prop_designs.symbol_rule: No faction emblem; these are intimate family objects.

costume_designs.silhouette: Lean 17-year-old hunter, short practical layers, left shoulder slight asymmetry, bow and route pack hang-points.
negative_rules: do not age him into adult warlord
do not turn costume into beggar rags

costume_designs.silhouette: 18-year-old trained aristocratic posture; clean, controlled lines even when tired.
materials: vermilion and royal-blue old-imperial formal layers
worn gold trim used only for reveal state
identity_anchors: no visible Sun-Moon mark on fugitive front layer
negative_rules: do not expose royal emblem on fugitive outfit
do not make travel state dirty or disheveled
do not use modern princess styling

costume_designs.silhouette: 15-16-year-old fast-moving Wallfoot girl; short jacket, compact layers, close-to-wall body language.
materials: small dark-green scale arcs near ear
negative_rules: do not make a clean faction uniform
do not turn her into generic thief costume

costume_designs.silhouette: Around 50, broad but weather-bent old wall master; thick layers and old armor pieces, not palace general.
identity_anchors: hidden nearly-erased Sun-Moon pressure mark on inherited armor
negative_rules: do not show complete Zhaoming badge
do not make him shiny heroic commander
do not make armor clean or palace-like

costume_designs.silhouette: Over 2 meters tall, vertical, slender upper-intelligence insect ruler form; high cylindrical official hat, near-human handsome official face, dark compound eyes, and no visible human hair.
materials: dark compound eyes in human eye positions
identity_anchors: thin vertical white straps or bead chains
negative_rules: do not make him an ugly insect head or masked human
do not turn him into black-armored warlord
do not make lower-tier insect anatomy generic

costume_designs.silhouette: Child proportions around 8-10 years old; small, quick, simple village garment, then unnervingly clean institutional state.
identity_anchors: wrist insect-wax ring in Qingming state
negative_rules: do not create horror victim styling
do not lose family relics in Qingming state

faction_rows: Qingming Court upper official, clerk, needle attendant, and lower military binding differences
Grey Wall Army military household clothing
hierarchy_rules: Qingming upper officials are clean, white, vertical, and near-human official silhouettes but visibly insect; lower military units must be non-human chitin, low and armed.
Grey Wall has no clean state emblem; marks appear as worn armor pressure, bone whistle and wall cloth.
Wallfoot has no official uniform; identity comes from pocket systems, pass tags, pottery charms and concealed trade layers.
Zhaoming fugitive use hides royal signs; formal old empire use can show vermilion, royal blue, moon-white and worn gold.

crowd_groups: Jinhe grain-mill laborers and boat workers
Qingming Court clerks and child identifiers
Wallfoot market vendors and military families
costume_designs.design_rule: Every crowd type must show work function, class pressure and local color while remaining clean enough to read occupation and region.
